title: Carbon PvP Pack
description:
Carbon PvP Pack Provides cool looks like an Dark Knight.
it's a pvp pack based on black themed
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you "Carbon PvP Pack ".
its is a simple and black themed PvP texture pack
its change texture of the armors and weapons
this pack make your PvP fight better and beautiful.
and by new texture you can enjoy the Minecraft in a new way.
Carbon PvP Pack Provides cool looks like an Dark Knight.

Optifine required for glowong textures.
materials are:-

1)Golden Armor Set
2)Diamoand Armor Set
3)Netherite Armor Set
4)Iron Armor Set
5)Totem
6)Bow
7)Arrow
8)Crossbow
9)End crystal
10)Golden Apple
11)Golden Tools
12)Diamond Tools
13)Netherite Tools
14)Iron Tools
15)Golden Sword
16)Diamond Sword
17)Netherite Sword
18)Iron Sword
19)Elytra
20)Shield
21)Trident
22)all kind of arrows
23)Leather Armor Set
24)Chain Armor Set
25)Wooden Sword
26)Wooden Tools
27)Stone Sword
28)Stone Tools
29)Horse Armor


This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Carbon PvP Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
